text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, were you napping during class? When I looked
over, you were uncharacteristically still...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! Y-you must be imagining things! Sleeping
in class is forbidden! Prohibited! Absolutely not
allowed!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What a lovely sentiment... But I saw you nodding
off, so please stop lying.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Awww... I guess I can't fool you, Grass...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've been trying to wake up early to get in a bit
more running, but... now I'm so sleepy...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I suppose I could show you my class notes just this once.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass... Gracias! You have my gratitude!
Appreciation! My deepest thanks!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Wait, if you're going to show me your notes,
then I can take a short siesta during—
